theme: International Business Travel and Meeting Coordination
passages: Chloe Laurent has been tasked with finalizing the itinerary for the July 25 summit, where she must ensure that all key stakeholders are available to discuss potential investments with AI industry leaders.

questions.question: Chloe Laurent is working diligently to ______ the meeting schedule for the AI investment summit on July 25 to ensure all high-level executives can attend.
questions.explanation: 本題考查商務情境中的高頻動詞。coordinate（協調、安排）最符合安排會議行程的情境。implement（執行）、substitute（替代）、abandon（放棄）皆不符合語意。

passages: From: Oliver Sterling, Director of Operations

Due to the current economic downturn, the company has made the difficult decision to close several underperforming retail locations by the end of the quarter. We are currently working to minimize the impact on affected personnel, and we appreciate your ________ as we navigate this transition.

questions.question: We are currently working to minimize the impact on affected personnel, and we appreciate your ________ as we navigate this transition.
questions.explanation: 本題考查商務情境下的高頻詞彙。句意為「我們正致力於將衝擊降至最低，並感謝您在我們度過此轉型期時的『合作』」。(A) cooperation 合作；(B) interference 干涉；(C) negligence 疏忽；(D) objection 反對。根據語意，選擇 A 最符合商務禮儀。

theme: 國際商務出差與行程安排

questions.question: ______ the tight schedule on October 23, Simon de Almeida managed to finalize the presentation for the government officials regarding the proposed AI investments.
questions.explanation: 本題考查連接詞與介係詞的用法。空格後方「the tight schedule on October 23」為名詞短語，因此應選介係詞。Despite 是介係詞，後接名詞；Although、Because 與 Even though 均為連接詞，後需接完整子句（主詞+動詞）。故選 B。

questions.question: On January 12, Chloe Laurent announced that the facility would begin ______ the food processing byproducts into organic fertilizer to comply with the new environmental safety standards.
questions.explanation: 本題考查動詞用法。動詞 begin 後面可接不定詞 (to V) 或動名詞 (V-ing)，但在商務英語中，針對持續性或習慣性的流程改善，使用 V-ing 形容該動作的進行較為常見。且 begin 搭配 repurposing 表達開始著手處理某項業務流程，符合語意。

questions.question: Regarding the recent memo issued on July 17, Vikram Patel noted that the company ______ the risks of uncontrolled AI development for several months before the board decided to initiate a formal policy review.
questions.explanation: 本題考查過去完成進行式（had been + V-ing）。句中提到「董事會決定啟動審查」是一個過去的時間點，而「評估風險」發生在此之前且持續了一段時間，因此使用過去完成進行式來強調動作的持續性與先後順序。

passages:
Subject: Coordination for the October 12 AI Investment Summit

Dear Chloe Laurent,

I hope this email finds you well. As we approach the upcoming quarter, I am finalizing the agenda for the high-level meeting with AI industry leaders scheduled for October 12. Given the critical nature of our proposed investments, it is imperative that we have all stakeholders aligned before the session begins.

Oliver Sterling has requested that we move the start time from 10:00 AM to 9:00 AM to accommodate an unexpected flight delay involving several key delegates from Silicon Valley. Furthermore, due to the sensitive nature of the proprietary algorithms being discussed, Oliver insists that all attendees sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) upon arrival at the conference center. 

Please confirm if you can update the digital invitations and inform the security team regarding the NDA protocols by the end of this business day. Your assistance in ensuring this summit proceeds smoothly is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

Corporate Operations Team

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the meeting on October 12?

options.A: To review the performance of the company's internal AI software.
options.B: To discuss potential investments with leaders in the AI industry.
options.C: To celebrate the successful launch of a new product.
options.D: To organize a training seminar for new employees.

questions.explanation: 文章提到 meeting with AI industry leaders is being scheduled to discuss investments，故選 B。

questions.question: Why did Oliver Sterling request a change to the meeting schedule?

options.A: He needs more time to prepare his presentation.
options.B: He has a conflicting appointment in the afternoon.
options.C: Key delegates are experiencing flight delays.
options.D: The conference center is only available starting at 9:00 AM.

questions.explanation: 文中提到 Oliver Sterling 要求改時間是為了 accommodate an unexpected flight delay involving several key delegates，故選 C。

questions.question: What must Chloe Laurent do by the end of the business day?

options.A: Draft a new NDA for the AI industry leaders to sign.
options.B: Book flights for the delegates arriving from Silicon Valley.
options.C: Update the meeting invitations and notify the security team.
options.D: Reschedule the entire summit to a different date.

questions.explanation: 信件結尾要求 Chloe 更新 digital invitations 並通知 security team 關於 NDA protocols，故選 C。

theme: Business Travel Itinerary for AI Investment Meeting
passages:
From: Fiona Gallagher, Senior Operations Manager
To: Simon de Almeida, Chief Strategy Officer
Date: January 9
Subject: Final Preparations for the AI Investment Summit

Dear Simon,

With our crucial meeting with government officials regarding the new AI investments scheduled for January 12, I am writing to finalize our itinerary. Given the unpredictable snowstorms forecasted in the capital this week, I have adjusted our arrival time to ensure we are not delayed.

We are now scheduled to depart on the morning of January 11. I have arranged a private shuttle to collect you from your office at 9:00 AM, which will take us directly to the airport. Please ensure all digital copies of the AI project proposals are encrypted and uploaded to the secure server by 5:00 PM today. 

Upon arrival, we will check into the Grand Plaza Hotel, which is conveniently located within walking distance of the ministry office. I have scheduled a briefing session for us at 8:00 PM on January 11 at the hotel lounge to review the final agenda. Please confirm if these arrangements meet your approval so I can finalize the bookings.

Best regards,

Fiona Gallagher

questions.question: Why did Fiona Gallagher adjust the travel schedule?

options.A: To accommodate a request from government officials.
options.C: To allow more time for the project presentation.
options.D: To attend an earlier briefing session at the hotel.

questions.explanation: 文章提到由於預報有暴風雪（unpredictable snowstorms），Fiona 調整了行程以確保不會延誤。

questions.question: What is Simon de Almeida expected to do by 5:00 PM on January 9?

options.A: Complete the final draft of the AI project proposals.
options.B: Confirm the hotel booking for the trip.
options.C: Upload encrypted project files to the secure server.
options.D: Meet with Fiona at the company office.

questions.explanation: 信中明確要求 Simon 在 1 月 9 日下午 5 點前將加密後的 AI 專案計畫書上傳至安全伺服器。

questions.question: Where will Fiona and Simon meet to discuss the agenda?
questions.explanation: 文章提到 Fiona 安排於 1 月 11 日晚上 8 點在飯店的大廳（hotel lounge）進行簡報會議以審閱議程。

theme: Office & HR Announcement: Retail Closure and Career Transition
passages:
[DOC 1] Internal Memo
To: All Staff
From: Amara Diallo, HR Director
Date: October 27
Subject: Retail Location Closures

Due to ongoing economic challenges, the company has made the difficult decision to close three of our retail locations effective November 30. We understand that this news is unsettling. We are committed to supporting all affected employees during this transition. We encourage those impacted to apply for internal vacancies at our corporate headquarters. Current opportunities include roles in logistics, marketing, and customer relations. Please visit the company portal to view the full job descriptions.

[DOC 2] Cover Letter
To: Amara Diallo, HR Director
From: Rachel Green
Date: October 27
Subject: Application for Marketing Coordinator Position

Dear Ms. Diallo,

Following the announcement regarding the retail location closures, I am writing to express my strong interest in the Marketing Coordinator position at the headquarters. Having worked as a Retail Supervisor for five years, I have developed a deep understanding of our customer base. While I am saddened by the closure of my current branch, I am eager to leverage my frontline experience to contribute to the marketing team's strategy. Attached is my updated resume for your review. Thank you for your time and consideration during this period of change.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the internal memo sent by Amara Diallo?

options.A: To invite employees to a company meeting.
options.B: To announce that several retail branches will be shutting down.
options.C: To promote Rachel Green to a new role.
options.D: To discuss the quarterly financial reports.

questions.explanation: 根據 [DOC 1]，Amara Diallo 發布備忘錄是為了通知員工，由於經濟挑戰，公司將關閉三家零售門市。

questions.question: When must the retail locations mentioned in the memo cease operations?
questions.explanation: [DOC 1] 明確提到關閉日期為 November 30。

questions.question: What is Rachel Green's current professional status?

options.A: She is a marketing specialist at the headquarters.
options.B: She is a human resources assistant.
options.C: She is a supervisor at one of the retail locations.
options.D: She is a new applicant from outside the company.

questions.explanation: [DOC 2] 中 Rachel Green 提到她擔任 Retail Supervisor（零售主管）已有五年。

questions.question: Why does Rachel Green believe she is a good fit for the Marketing Coordinator position?

options.A: She has completed a degree in marketing.
options.B: She has extensive knowledge of the company's customers from her retail experience.
options.C: She was asked by Amara Diallo to apply.
options.D: She wants to avoid working in retail.

questions.explanation: [DOC 2] 中提到她希望利用自己五年的前線經驗（frontline experience）以及對客戶群（customer base）的深刻理解來協助行銷團隊。

theme: Factory Safety & Maintenance and Byproduct Repurposing
passages:
[DOC 1] January 5 Maintenance and Safety Schedule

08:00 - 09:30: Routine inspection of conveyor belts (Zone A).
09:30 - 11:00: Safety briefing regarding the new byproduct processing system.
11:00 - 12:30: Implementation of new methods to repurpose food processing byproducts efficiently.
12:30 - 13:30: Lunch Break.
13:30 - 15:00: Calibration of sensory equipment for waste reduction.
15:00 - 17:00: Final safety audit conducted by Sofia Martinez.

[DOC 2] Internal Memo: Urgent Update

To: All Staff
From: Fiona Gallagher, Operations Manager
Date: January 5

Due to unexpected pressure fluctuations in the secondary steam pipe discovered during the 08:00 inspection, we must adjust today’s schedule. The implementation of the new methods to repurpose food processing byproducts efficiently is now postponed until tomorrow morning. Sofia Martinez will move her final safety audit to 11:00 to ensure the facility remains secure while we address the pipe issue. Please report any abnormal vibrations in the machinery to your floor supervisor immediately.

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the change in today's schedule?

options.A: Sofia Martinez requested a change to the audit timeline.
options.B: The new byproduct methods were deemed ineffective.
options.C: Abnormalities were detected in the steam pipes.
options.D: Fiona Gallagher decided to extend the lunch break.

questions.explanation: 根據DOC 2，由於早上檢查時發現二次蒸氣管壓力波動，因此必須調整今日行程。

questions.question: According to the updated schedule, when will Sofia Martinez conduct her safety audit?
questions.explanation: DOC 2 指出 Sofia Martinez 將最終安全稽核調整至 11:00 進行。

questions.question: What is the status of the byproduct repurposing project?

options.A: It was completed during the morning session.
options.C: It is being postponed to the following day.
options.D: It was integrated into the audit process.

questions.explanation: DOC 2 明確提到該項目的執行被延後至明天早上。

questions.question: What are employees instructed to do if they notice unusual machinery vibrations?

options.C: Shut down the conveyor belts in Zone A.
options.D: Wait for the safety audit to report it.

questions.explanation: DOC 2 最後一句提到，若發現機器異常震動，請立即向樓層主管回報。
